headline: K:AI Marketing Agent for Campaign Automation
snippet: The biggest difference is that Marketing Agent is a proactive, specialized agent, not a general-purpose tool. You don’t need to write prompts or tell it what to do. Marketing Agent analyzes your busin
full_text: The biggest difference is that Marketing Agent is a proactive, specialized agent, not a general-purpose tool. You don’t need to write prompts or tell it what to do. Marketing Agent analyzes your business and proactively builds what you need—complete campaigns, flows, and forms—all trained on your unique brand voice and ready to go live with a single click.
